Nebraska depends on the 3pt shot way too much

title: About
text: Hello! My name is Trey Gibbs, and I am currently a sophomore at the University of Nebraska–Lincoln. I am pursuing a double major in Sports Media and Broadcasting, and I have a strong passion for storytelling and covering athletics. My long-term goal is to become a sports commentator, where I can combine my knowledge of sports with my communication skills to inform and engage audiences.
